Module org.eclipse.persistence.core
Package org.eclipse.persistence.tools.schemaframework

Class ConstraintObjectDefinition

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.persistence.tools.schemaframework.DatabaseObjectDefinition
org.eclipse.persistence.tools.schemaframework.ConstraintObjectDefinition
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable
Direct Known Subclasses:
CheckConstraint, ForeignKeyConstraint, PrimaryKeyConstraint, UniqueKeyConstraint
public abstract class ConstraintObjectDefinition extends DatabaseObjectDefinition
